plugins.name: memory-system
plugins.description: Project memory and task-journal workflow with on-demand index generation.

plugins.name: ticket-resolver
plugins.description: JIRA-driven bug-fix orchestrator: analyze → implement → review → verify → PR, human-gated.

plugins.name: architect-goggles
plugins.description: Architect Goggles: a visual surface for looking at a codebase — agent-generated, task-scoped architecture maps (PCE) with structural and behavioral projections, black-box perimeter tracking, change review as diagram diffs, and a local viewer.
